case_title: OSCAR TALAVERA VS. STEPHANIE LINDSEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JOHN BARRY ON 1-8-2018. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2018 BY JPT:DAVID LAVINE; ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT; DEFENDANTS WAIVED SERVICE; CLERK: P. PAREDES, NO EXHIBITS RETAINED; NOT REPORTED (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LINDSEY, STEPHANIE BARRY, JOHN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TALAVERA, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT LINDSEY, STEPHANIE BARRY, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY TALAVERA, OSCAR LINDSEY, STEPHANIE BARRY, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TALAVERA, OSCAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINDSEY, STEPHANIE BARRY, JOHN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,575.00, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED LIABILITY BY DEFENDANTS FOR A LOW-IMPACT CAR ACIDENT. PAYMENT OF $1500.00 IS ORDERED TO COVER EXISTING AND SUBSEQUENT CHIROPRACTER BILLS. JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
